feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: link chart and table in SAC
entry.content:
Chart_1 is id of a numeric chart shows count of customers. 

Table_1 is id of a table has columns of customer name, Network id.

now upon clicking chart_1 it should redirect to Table _1 to show reference.

entry.title: In the drop-down list, select a specified data model and select dimensions in the data model
entry.content: Expected: The drop-down box is used to query the name field in the active employee data model, and after you select a name, the list can change in real time based on the selected name. Tell me, guys, how to achieve this?

entry.title: Extract Stories using the rest api in SAC trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new to SAP Analytics Cloud. Need to get the details of Stories and Models from SAP Analytics Cloud using the REST APIs in the trial account. So far I could see, from the documentation, we have the rest apis available and with OAUTH authentication, which needs Administrator option for OAUTH client. 

Is there any other option available to execute REST APIs in a trial account ? Any help in this regard would be helpful.

Thanks,

Sreedhar Rusuma

entry.title: Geo maps do not support cities in China, can they be highlighted according to the area where the per
entry.content: I see that there is only the whole list of support for this download, and there are no specific cities in the mainland

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Custom Widget Testing
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm not an experienced developer and have just successfully developed my first custom widgets.

However, I found the testing process for my implementation to be cumbersome. Every time I added a new line of code or encountered an error, I had to delete the custom widget from SAC and re-upload the changed files.

Is there any way to test the code directly in the browser without having to delete and re-upload to SAC each time? Currently, the widgets consist of three JavaScript files for the main, builder, and styling, along with a JSON file. I attempted to test the script using a live server extension in VS Code, but without success (I'm also new to web components). I would greatly appreciate any advice or guidance on this matter.

Thanks & best regards

Tim

entry.title: Different types of decimal types in dataset
entry.content:
Hi all

the problem that I have is that our data is from different countries. Which means that some people will use a '.' or a ',' as a decimal type. But Datasphere cannot work with both at the same time. Is there anyway I can fix this? This field could also be left empty or '0'. I already tried to make something (see pictures) but it still filters out some data.

Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Change empty fields '-' to '0'
entry.content:
Hi

I am currently building in Datasphere but I ran into a small problem. The fields that contain no values (displayed as '-' in datasphere, get filtered out later on in my view. But fields that have a '0' as value, do not get filtered out. So an "easy" solution to this seems to convert all the empty fields into '0', but I do not manage to find the expression for this. Anyone who can help me? Thanks in advance

entry.title: Clarification on Iterate function in SAC model
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can someone please help me in understanding the Iterate function. I have taken the below example : I have created 4 calculated measures with Iterate formula. 

My assumption after referring some doc is, Iterate function will do cumulative sum based on dimension values(let's consider the date dimension with different granularity). For this I have considered the below example, where i have created multiple Calculated measures with Iterate function with all date(considered only 2024 and 2025) permutation. so since we have 12 month data, the iterate function should do cumulative for 24 times and summation should result in 240. 

 

Based on the above output, I see all the calculated measures are matching with my assumption, but for the Calculated measures Iterate Quantity Calday, I see the different values. 

Can someone please help me in getting this functionality of this Iterate. 

Thanks & Regards,

Praveen.

entry.title: Successfactors story report maximum date
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a story report which is returning multiple rows in my query.  But I need to show only one record in my story table which I am doing it as a cross tab table.  I need to find the maximum date(let's say the maximum date of effective start date for example) and show it in the report. How do I accomplish this? All the different calculated fields in the story are allowing the MAX function only for dimensions(numbers) and not date fields. 

Can you please let me know if you figured out a way to get the maximum date from multiple rows?

Thanks,

Vicky.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Flatten hierarchy into columns
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any way to flatten hierarchy into multiple columns depending on number of levels?

Like for Cost Center we have many levels and need to see into separate columns rather drilling down to respective level.

entry.title: SAC: Do we need to define the properties of a dimension as text or integer to use it as a date?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP SAC, how we need to define the properties of a dimension, i.e., as text or integer to use it as a date, e.g., as shown below to be used in the commission calculation:

EmpID       start_date     sales_start_date

Emp1        02152021    05012021

Emp2        09052022     10012022

Emp3       10092023      01052024

We have the below scenario for commission calculation:

Each Employee has a start_date and sales_start_date

Every month, on any given day, when a Data Action is run, it has to calculate Today - Sales_start_date. 

If it is over 2 years and above, the commission is 2.5% of the Net Sales by that sales person, 

If it is less than 2 years but greater than or above 1 year, it's 1.75% of the net sales. 

It it is less than 1 year, it's a fixed value of $1000.

How to achieve this and with what data type, the start_date and sales_start_date properties of EmpID dimension have to be defined as, as there is no 'date' data type in SAC.

Thanks,

SP

entry.title: SAC F4 help new lines with hierarchy visualization not working drill down
entry.content:
I am working with an SAC planning table based on a model BPC live connection on a BW version 7.5 SP28. When I add a new member to introduce new lines in the table it is working fine, but if I would like to see the F4 input help when the hierarchy is active I am not able to drill down in the hierarchy. I see only the root hierarchy node, but nothing else. If I use the searching cell without using the match code the search works fine, but I would like to know if it is possible to use the search with the hierarchy activated in the match code by displaying the hierarchy.

I checked the SAP note https://me.sap.com/notes/3238379 , but in my case versión BW 7.5 SP28 already has those patches implemented.

Best Regards,

entry.title: bar chart: specify interval unit of y axis (%) => R or custom widget needed?
entry.content:
Hi,
if a bar chart's y-axis should not only show 0% and 100% but for example  5 percent points increments - is this only possible with R visualization / custom chart?

br
edgar

entry.title: How to apply a function to fetch data from a user?
entry.content:
1. In Analytic application there is a option to add Filter Line, please find the screenshot attached below.

 

When we click on this filter this below pop up comes

 

 

We want user should visualize in the below format( As visible in all stories). Please find the screenshot attached below.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAC how to get performance form rating data from successfactors.
entry.content:
In SAC, how to get performance form rating data from Success Factors?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Hello Gurus,Is it possible to have conditional approval process using SAC ?
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

Is it possible to have conditional approval process using SAC ? I know its possible to create calendar composite task using the story scripting, but in that way I need manually to maintain the assignee and reviewers. Is there a way to automate it ?

The scenario is business owner create a project and based on type of project there is approval process. For example if he select type of project as (IT assets) an approval process should take place to IT before going to his head of department. But for other types it shouldn't go to IT.

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud License growth
entry.content:
I want to track SAP Analytics Cloud Named License growth Daily.

I checked System>Monitor which has a graph under Historical Usage with types of licenses and count but is very squished as a result change is not visible. Confusing button options as well.

I checked License data model but that does not have date. Other data models I came across focuses only on active users and active content.

Any suggestions , please? I want to track licenses (users may be active or inactive but Not deactivated) count change over time (daily). This is to understand 

1. what is the rate of growth of user licenses (all types segregated so to understand type wise growth).

2. Answer no.1 should answer our general order capacity for extension of license count and generally when we should order to ensure enough capacity?

Regards,

Ratish

entry.title: How to create a custom report to analysis the license usage in SAC?
entry.content:
Now only Named user license is available in SAC. How we can anlysis the usage of these licesnse consumed in SAC instead of standard or custom report?

Any Standard data model we can use to create a report?

entry.title: SAC - Use a value from another table/datasource in calculations (Excel Cell reference in formulas)
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I've got the requirement to calculate a "revenue per" figure where the base for the calculation comes from a totally different datasource. In excel you simply reference the cell with the base value.
But how to achieve this in SAC? Any ideas? 

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: Currency Conversion: Different Booking Date for different Account Elements
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am using a New Model with an Account Dimension, one Measure and one calculated Measure. In the Account Dimension, I am using two key figures, for one of them I have to use the booking date as the reference, for the other one I am using Booking date + 1 month.

It is possible to realize this with 2 converted measures, one for each key figure. But this leads to problems in the table in the story, if I want to show both key figures in one table.

I want to display it like this:

 Converted Measure
Key figure 112
Key figure 210

But currently, it looks like this:

 Converted Measure 1Converted Measure 2
Key figure 11213
Key figure 2910

So my question is whether it is possible to make adjustments to a single Account Element? Or is there a different workaround?

Thanks you!

Kind regards,
Eric
